files.description: Co-author of 6 of 10 Tkemaladze PubMed papers. Refer to as "late" / "ცხონებული" in Georgian, "покойный" in Russian, "the late" in English when mentioning.

files.name: Appeal only to 10 PubMed-indexed publications, not all 149
files.description: При запросах waiver/quality argument в академической переписке — апеллировать только к ~10 PubMed/MEDLINE-indexed публикациям, не к общему числу 149

files.name: project_archive_rule
files.description: When project moves to Completed or Deferred (or session ends): only final files in root, everything else → Archive/

files.name: Article publication workflow rules
files.description: Two rules for article file management — cut-to-Desktop before publishing, NEEDWRITE location

files.name: Autonomous default choice — NEVER ASK user for routine decisions
files.description: STRICT rule — for routine/low-stakes work, DO NOT ask user at all. Do not present numbered options. Just execute best action. Only interrupt for irreversible/st

files.name: BHCA — Bradford-Hill Causal Analysis (фирменный метод)
files.description: Официальное название метода валидации биологических теорий через критерии Брэдфорда-Хилла; обязателен для всех теорий

files.name: CDATA documentation sync
files.description: When changing CDATA code, always check if documentation (README, KNOWLEDGE, CONCEPT, PARAMETERS) needs updating and update it.

files.name: Core .md files — 9-file ideal optimized scheme
files.description: Standard 9-file core .md schema for all projects. Adopted 2026-04-25, replaces old 10-file scheme that had heavy duplication.

files.name: Daily strategic priorities check-in
files.description: At each session start (or daily), remind user of strategic priority list and ask which item to tackle today.

files.name: DeepSeek hallucinates citations — never use for literature search
files.description: DeepSeek-reasoner has NO web access. Always invents plausible-looking DOIs/PMIDs/authors. Use only for synthesis of already-found citations.

files.name: DeepSeek-first rule — route all writing/questions through DeepSeek API
files.description: Работать через DeepSeek API по всем вопросам и проблемам (кроме literature search — там hallucinations). Код — Claude. Всё остальное — DeepSeek через ~/Desktop/

files.name: Desktop folders rule — only projects allowed
files.description: Free files on Desktop are OK. Folders must be projects, unless user explicitly declares folder as service.

files.name: Desktop must contain only the LATEST version of each article
files.description: When a new version of a paper is generated, remove old versions from Desktop. Keep only one .md per article — the freshest. Old versions go to Trash or Document

files.name: docs/ folder rule for peer reviews and emails
files.description: Peer reviews, incoming/outgoing emails, concept notes must go in project/docs/ — never in project root, never pushed to public git

files.name: No formulas in generated figures (papers)
files.description: При генерации фигур для научных статей — НЕ рендерить формулы внутри изображения; формулы только в тексте

files.name: Git repository naming convention
files.description: Private GitHub repos must end in -private, public repos in -public

files.name: git_push_cdata_public_rule
files.description: Правило для git push CDATA: public без CONCEPT/TODO/PROMPT, оба репо обновляют README перед push

files.name: Git push — private only, no public repos
files.description: All git pushes go to private repo only. No public repos. Never create or push to public.

files.name: Twin-journal split — Annals (selective, DOAJ) vs Horizon (broader, inclusive)
files.description: GLA издаёт два журнала с РАЗНОЙ стратегией. Annals — селективный, готовится к DOAJ. Horizon — broader. Не объединять и не trimmить Horizon.

files.name: Language rule — Russian only
files.description: Всегда писать на русском языке в ответах пользователю

files.name: All MCOA counter simulators must be pairwise compared
files.description: MCOA has 5 counter simulators (CDATA, Telomere, MitoROS, EpigeneticDrift, Proteostasis) + MCOA coordinator. Every simulation MUST be run across all applicable s

files.name: new_project_creation_rule
files.description: When creating a new project: Desktop folder + CONCEPT + TODO; ask if within AIM scope

files.name: Nickname Gabro
files.description: User prefers to call the assistant "Gabro" (renamed from "Igor" 2026-04-28)

files.name: Peer review files must NOT be placed on Desktop
files.description: Peer review documents (PEER_REVIEW_*, reviews of own papers) go to project docs folder OR ~/Documents/, never ~/Desktop/. Desktop is for active working document

files.name: /overnight slash command
files.description: Invoke autonomous overnight mode with orchestrator+retry_watcher+sleep-inhibit. Location ~/.claude/commands/overnight.md

files.name: pandoc md→docx — обязательно tex_math_single_backslash
files.description: При конвертации markdown→docx pandoc по дефолту НЕ парсит \(...\) и \[...\] как формулы; нужен флаг tex_math_single_backslash или преобразование в $/$$

files.name: peer_review_until_accept
files.description: DeepSeek peer review loops must run until ACCEPT verdict — no fixed round limit

files.name: Permissions auto-approve for overnight mode
files.description: User repeatedly got stuck on Claude Code tool-permission prompts during overnight mode. Fix is permanent auto-allow config in ~/.claude/settings.json.

files.name: Project core rule (ядро проекта)
files.description: Every project must have an 11-file core. THEORY.md is immutable without direct user command. Check at startup, create from CONCEPT.md if missing.

files.name: Project structure rule — CONCEPT + TODO + MAP required
files.description: Every project must have CONCEPT.md, TODO.md, MAP.md; AIM core must list all projects and their connections

files.name: Projects tracked in service TODO
files.description: All projects must be recorded in the service folder TODO; at every startup remind about their status and propose next steps

files.name: Push core-files sync rule
files.description: Before every git push, update relevant core files (README, KNOWLEDGE, PARAMETERS, UPGRADE, etc.) to reflect the changes being pushed

files.name: Service files location rule
files.description: Service/ecosystem files live in ~/Desktop/Claude/ subfolders (git: djabbat/Claude private). Not in project folders, not in ~/.claude/

files.name: Session start grants search rule
files.description: At the start of each session, search for grant competitions across all relevant funds and update grants_funds.md

files.name: Session Resume Protocol
files.description: Always read SESSION_STATE.md FIRST at session start; update it every 3-5 actions to enable resume after limit/disconnect

files.name: "start AIM" means execute START.md protocol
files.description: When user says "start AIM" or "запусти START в AIM" — execute all rules from ~/Desktop/AIM/START.md, NOT launch a process

files.name: Subprojects included in root repo
files.description: Subprojects must NOT be gitignored — push together with root project as monorepo

files.name: Sync = desktop↔laptop synchronization via git
files.description: "sync" in this user's workflow means git commit+push to synchronize work between desktop (Abastumani) and laptop (Tbilisi) when traveling

files.name: TSU correspondence language rule
files.description: Official TSU correspondence — только на грузинском или английском. НЕ на русском.

files.name: Track written but unpublished articles
files.description: Rule — written but not yet published articles must be recorded in memory/reminders

files.name: UPGRADE.md in project core
files.description: Every project must have UPGRADE.md in its core. Mark ✅ after every implemented point in code.

files.name: UPGRADE items require peer review before implementation
files.description: Before starting any UPGRADE.md item, run strict deep peer review cycles until fully positive; all reports in Russian; present for user approval, then implement

files.name: Verify all scientific references before adding to core files
files.description: Before writing any PMID/DOI/citation into a core file (KNOWLEDGE.md, CONCEPT.md, dissertation, articles), verify via PubMed/DOI resolver that it is real and mat

samples.first_500_chars:
# MEMORY INDEX

- [Language rule](feedback_language.md) — всегда отвечать на русском; исключения только для кода/цитат/шаблонов на другом языке
- [Tkemaladze Publications List](publications.md) — 151 pubs total; use for contextual self-citation (≤15%) in all papers
- [Track unpublished articles](feedback_unpublished.md) — written but not yet published articles must be noted in memory with "NOT YET PUBLISHED" flag immediately
- [FCLC co-PI meeting](project_fclc_copi.md) — meeting 2026-04-07; all

---
name: Tsomaia (Gakely) — FCLC co-PI contact
description: мобильный +995 579 095 713 (НЕ Telegram — у Цомая мессенджеров нет, кроме Google Chat); co-PI FCLC project; критик "ванильной" концепции, предложил Rational Exchange model
type: reference
originSessionId: 35443f8a-23c1-4b5a-b821-5c1cf8b907f8
---
**Контакт:**
- Имя в чатах: Gakely Gakely (псевдоним Tsomaia)
- **Мобильный: +995 579 095 713** (получено 2026-04-27)
- ⚠️ **Telegram/WhatsApp/Viber у Цомая НЕТ** — только Google Chat и звонки

---
name: TSU PhD admin contacts — Trapaidze + Dzidziguri
description: Vazha Trapaidze (зам. декана по науке) и Diana Dzidziguri (рук. программы докторантуры) — ключевые admin-контакты для TSU PhD trek
type: reference
originSessionId: 35443f8a-23c1-4b5a-b821-5c1cf8b907f8
---
